name: corvus
description: AI-powered Thunderbird extension with multi-provider support

scripts.build: npm run build:background && npm run build:ui && npm run merge:ui
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../corvus.xpi * -x '*.map'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:background && npm run lint:ui
scripts.lint:ui: eslint src/ui/src --ext .ts,.mjs && eslint src/ui/vite.config.ts src/ui/tailwind.config.ts src/ui/postcss.config.mjs
scripts.test:ui: cd src/ui && npm run typecheck && find src/features -name '*.test.mjs' -print0 | xargs -0 -r node --test
